title: Delicate Dutch Egg Bowl
description: A simple yet elegant breakfast dish featuring delicate asparagus, tender eggs, and toasted Dutch bread.
instructions: Cut the asparagus into 1-inch pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Place the asparagus on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 12-15 minutes.
Toast the Dutch bread slices until lightly browned.
Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add the eggs.
Cook the eggs until the whites are set and the yolks are cooked to your desired doneness.
To assemble the dish, place a toasted bread slice on a plate, top with a portion of asparagus, and finish with a cooked egg.
